pages.text: LEVELED Book , C Rocks Written by Kitty Higgins wwwreadinga-z.com
Rocks Written by Kitty Higgins wwwreadinga-z.com
This is a mountain: Rocks Level C 3
A mountain is made Of rock
This is a boulder: It broke off the mountain: Rocks Level C 5
This is a stone. It broke off the boulder.
This is a pebble: It broke off the stone: Rocks Level C
This is sand: It broke off the pebble: 8
This is dust. Rocks Level C
Dust is the tiniest piece Of rock Dust is everywhere: 10
